intent: Proving a recall change actually works: verify end-to-end through the real auto-inject path (not units), why silently-degrading fast paths and ungated FTS fallbacks hide breakage, embed-coverage completeness, mechanical probes that must not reinforce, and --json output hygiene. Drill in before trusting a recall eval.
label: Recall eval & end-to-end verification (true inject path, silent-degradation gotchas)
